---
title: Soft Tissue Biomechanics Group @ [LMS](https://lms.ip-paris.fr/)
page-layout: full
image: resources/images/home_page_image_2.png
bibliography: resources/biblio/biblio_web.bib
toc: false
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Contact us
      href: https://th0maslavigne.github.io/LMS_Biomechanics/contact.html
    - text: "{{< iconify fa6-brands gitlab >}} Gitlab"
      href: https://src.koda.cnrs.fr/lms1
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <meta name="google-site-verification" content="tU9wtzWA1tzRdwTl-Sqo-j5PqUVDTz4gUn_Xy9Pji1Q" />
---
<!-- the above site verif should be updated -->


<style>
  /* --- 1. Background Image Setup --- */
  body::before {
    content: "";
    position: fixed; 
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100vw;
    height: 60vh;
    z-index: -2; 
    background-image: url("resources/images/LMS_Building.jpg");
    background-size: cover; 
    
    /* FIX: Keep the building dead center. 'cover' will naturally crop the sky and street without losing the building. */
    background-position: center center; 
    background-repeat: no-repeat;
  }

  /* Make underlying Quarto structure transparent */
  body, 
  #quarto-content, 
  .quarto-container, 
  .page-layout-custom, 
  #quarto-search-results {
    background-color: transparent !important;
  }

  /* --- 2. The Full-Bleed Content Box --- */
  div.quarto-about-trestles {
    background-color: var(--bs-body-bg) !important;
    z-index: 1;
    width: 100vw !important;
    max-width: 100vw !important;
    margin-left: calc(50% - 50vw) !important;
    margin-right: calc(50% - 50vw) !important;
    border-radius: 0 !important;

    /* FIX: Lock the vertical drop so it NEVER jumps up to cover the building */
    margin-top: 60vh !important; 
    
    /* Default padding for small screens */
    padding: 3rem 5% !important; 
  }

  /* --- 3. RESPONSIVE DESIGN (Horizontal Only!) --- */
  
  /* Medium Desktop Screens */
  @media (min-width: 992px) {
    div.quarto-about-trestles {
      /* Only squeeze the sides inward, keep the top alone */
      padding-left: 15vw !important; 
      padding-right: 15vw !important;
    }
  }

  /* Ultra-Wide Desktop Screens */
  @media (min-width: 1400px) {
    div.quarto-about-trestles {
      /* Squeeze a bit more for massive screens so text stays readable */
      padding-left: 25vw !important; 
      padding-right: 25vw !important;
    }
  }
  
  .page_contente {
    margin-top: -15vh; 
  }
</style>



:::::{.page_contente}
:::{#hero-heading}

# Welcome,

to the Soft Tissue Biomechanics research group. We are a dedicated multidisciplinary group within the [Laboratoire de Mécanique des Solides (LMS)](https://lms.ip-paris.fr/) at [Institut Polytechnique de Paris](https://www.ip-paris.fr/en).

Our primary scientific mission is to advance healthcare by bridging the gap between engineering and medicine. We apply rigorous **mechanics-dominant methodologies**—combining advanced experimental characterization with predictive computational modeling—to decipher the complex physical behavior of biological soft tissues across multiple scales. From understanding the mechanical pathways of pathology to designing biomimetic materials, we transform physical insights into biomedical innovations.

<div class="mt-4 d-flex justify-content-start align-items-center gap-2">
  <a href="research.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" role="button">Learn more about our Research</a>
  <a href="members.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" role="button">Meet the group @ LMS</a>
</div>

:::
:::::
